docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $180.00 FILED BY ROSE, MARGIE AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER, KARINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSE, MARGIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PARKER, KARINA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-03-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER, KARINA
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY ROSE, MARGIE PARKER, KARINA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-02-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-02-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: PENELOPE PAHL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
